Q2: Live Gold / Game Pass / Ultimate 有乜分別
A2:

Q3: 升級 Ultimate 到底點運作
A3: $10 體驗升級係將你現有 Live Gold 會藉有效日子全部提升做 Ultimate
購買 Ultimate 方案，將會自動依轉換率將現有 Xbox Live Gold 或 Xbox Game Pass 會員資格的剩餘天數分別升級為 Ultimate。

Q4: 屌咁我係咪可以買無限張 Live Gold再升
A4: 升級 Ultimate 只限 36個月或以內嘅 Live Gold / Game Pass資格，轉換後唔可以再將 Ultimate 會員資格轉換回先前會員資格至完結。每個帳戶一次最多只能兌換 36 個月 Ultimate...升級之後，超過嘅係唔會保留係您嘅帳戶。

Q5: Game Pass 遊戲庫係咪不變
A5: 遊戲數量可加可減，唔係永久，落咗架就算已下載落主機都係開唔番，遊戲標題和數量不時變更，並且會依國家/地區而有所不同。若未取消訂閱，則會以當時的價格收取會員資格費用。

Q6: 3年會藉完咗之後點算
A6: 終止會藉後，所有 Game Pass 嘅 Game + DLC 一律用唔到，直至你再續
如果您嘅會員資格終止或遊戲從目錄中移除，您必須重新啟用會員資格或個別購買遊戲，才能繼續使用這些物品。

Q7: 升級完買 Game 有折喎，新 Game 適唔適用
A7: 有 Ultimate 30日內出嘅新 Game 都無折扣，但 DLC 就有，面市 30 天內遊戲無折扣，並且不適用於特定的遊戲。31 天到 90 天，會員可獲得 Microsoft Store 價格高達 9 折優惠。 90 日後，最多可獲得 8 折。至於 DLC 發行當天可獲得高達 9 折優惠。

Q8: 隻 Game 係 Game Pass 遊戲庫下架，但我買咗DLC，咁點算
A8: 買番隻 Game 先玩到，您嘅 DLC 係唔會冇咗。不過想玩番就要購買數碼版、插入光碟或取得其他形式的權限至得。

Q9: $10 升級幾時完？依加續定好唔好
A9: 無人知

Q10: 本身舊 Xbox 有 Acc 買過乜 Live 乜 Pass，依加再買 Live Gold 用唔用到 $10 優惠
A10: 你可以嘗試係https://www.xbox.com/zh-HK/xbox-game-pass/pc-games?xr=shellnav 登入，再睇下加唔加到 $10 優惠落購物車，去判斷你仲買唔買到，但一律建議最好新AC，出事幫你唔到。

Q11: 乜乜乜 Game 未出 XSX / XSS 版，咁咪要買兩次
A11:

Q12: 上官網一年 Live Gold 都四舊水，跨區去巴西買得唔得聽講淘x都有得賣
A12: 一律建議用正常香港官方渠道，出事唔好喊

Q13: 搵唔到12個月嘅金會員 Link
A13: https://www.microsoftestore.com.hk/partner/product/12mogldcrd?locale=en_HK

Q14: XSX / XSS 都無對馬戰鬼，搵鬼買咩
A14: Xbox Series X/S 需求超過供應，可能明年四月前會缺貨

Q15: 係邊度兌換代碼
A15: https://redeem.microsoft.com/enter?ref=xboxcom&wa=wsignin1.0

Q16: 入 Code 有咩要注意
A16: 留意帳戶地區必須係香港

Q17: USB 3.1 外置 HDD 同專用 Seagate SSD 卡有咩分別
A:17
X/S Game 可以裝喺外置 USB 3.1 HDD/SSD，但唔可以用嚟玩 Game，玩要搬返落內置 SSD 或外置專用 SSD 卡，而專用 Seagate SSD 卡速度同內置一樣，定價為 USD 219.99

咁裝個 Game Pass App 落電話有咩好處呢

如果你主機同 app 揀o既地區係一樣嘅話，冇
所以我自己電話 app 地區就揀美國，主機地區就揀香港
另外o係 app 轉區方便好多，轉地區-->quit app-->再開就攪掂

咁點解要轉去美區/其他區呢?

咁喺美區睇到有咩 game 想玩，再 remote install 落主機就攪掂
大部份美區 game down 完用香港區都玩得，即係主機唔駛再轉區，但有少數例外如 MHW

另外 An 機用埋 VPN 可以玩埋 Xcloud 添，IOS 就好似下年初

美國、英國、法國、德國、奧地利、比利時、加拿大、捷克、丹麥、芬蘭、匈牙利、愛爾蘭、義大利、荷蘭、挪威、波蘭、葡萄牙、斯洛伐克、西班牙、瑞士、瑞典、韓國、日本、澳洲、巴西和墨西哥

用埋 Xcloud 嘅話，就可以一個人用電話，另一個人用主機咁同時玩，即係一部機一個 ultimate account 但可以兩個人同時玩

B account 用主機玩

Microsoft Rewards，簡單嚟講就係打機換錢(咁當然唔係換現金)，有好多野換嘅，不過比較正路就 1170 分換 $10 禮物卡啦 (覺得自己好好運嘅可以試下抽 Surface pro)

Microsoft Reward 點賺番嚟，我知嘅就五
個途徑，如果仲有其他就等巴打再補充

1. 喺 Microsoft Store 消費，呢個唔詳細講啦

2. Login 入 Xbox 個網頁，再 click 「我的 Microsoft 帳戶」，跟住去頂頭嗰度搵「獎勵」，之後通常都係叫你 click 條 link 睇下圖睇下片咁啦

3. 主機入面個 Microsoft Reward，咁又係 click 入去，跟住佢叫你睇乜就睇乜，做乜就做乜咁啦

4. Game Pass 個 App，分日任/週任/月任，要做乜就到時睇啦，不過通常都係叫你玩多幾隻唔同嘅 game / 解特定 game 嘅成就咁 (用 cloud 玩連 game 都唔駛裝)
有一個月任會有成 1000 Microsoft Rewards，係解 45 個日任同 15 個週任

5. Xbox FanFest，下面條 link 自己睇
https://www.xbox.com/zh-HK/community/fanfest

得閒咪篤兩野賺下分囉，反正微軟大把錢，緊張自己銀包好過緊張佢個銀包啦

Hotfix 1.04 is now also available on Xbox!

Xbox16GB更新
Fixed an issue with completing the final objective in Gig: Freedom of the Press.
Fixed an issue with starting conversation with Johnny at the end in Life During Wartime.
Corrected a rare issue with NPCs no longer calling V if A Like Supreme quest was abandoned mid-way.
Fixed an issue with Nix not going into his default state in Spellbound and KOLD MIRAGE.
Fixed issues blocking progress in I Fought The Law if the quest area is left.
Fixed inability to find Delamain in Epistrophy.
Fixed issues related to remaining in the second phase of the quest after finishing Pacifica fight with Ozob if played after Finals.
Fixed an issue with Nomads no longer present if V leaves the quest area mid-combat in With a Little Help from My Friends/Queen of the Highway.
Adjusted mappings and re-enabled quest tracker in M'ap Tann Pèlen/I Walk the Line/Transmission.
Fixed constraints on freedom to get up and sit down if neither blueline condition is met in Violence.
Fixed issues with time and space resulting from leaving the quest area or abandoning the quest in Following the River.
Fixed an issue with conversation with Johnny not starting after leaving the hotel in Tapeworm.
Fixed an issue with quest being blocked upon leaving the quest area before climbing the hill in Following the River.
Fixed the objective “Go into booth 9” not completing if the room’s entered too fast in Automatic Love.
Fixed Jackie’s issues with sitting still in The Ripperdoc.
Other quest fixes

Gameplay
Fixed the preview in weapon crafting.

Visual
Reduced vehicle appearance pop-in.
Speeded up switching first person perspective to third person perspective in a vehicle.
Fixed issues with animations missing from important quest NPCs during cinematics.

Performance & Stability
Improved stability, including various crash fixes.

Miscellaneous
Modified the flashing effect on braindances to reduce the risk of inducing epileptic symptoms. The effect has been smoothed out and the flashes reduced in frequency and magnitude.
Removed copyrighted songs incorrectly present in the game with "Disable Copyrighted Music" feature toggled on.

PC-specific
Switching language to default in the in-game settings now correctly sets it to the language of your Steam client.

Console-specific
Improved reflections quality on Xbox One and PlayStation 4 to eliminate the smudge effect.
Fixed “The Wasteland” achievement being stuck on 97% after completing all relevant missions in The Badlands on Xbox.
Fixed an issue with missing PT-BR VO for Xbox players in Americas.
